creator: paul@thistledew.org
text:
xsltproc -o evince-es.omf --stringparam db2omf.basename evince --stringparam db2omf.format 'docbook' --stringparam db2omf.dtd "-//OASIS//DTD DocBook XML V4.1.2//EN" --stringparam db2omf.lang es --stringparam db2omf.omf_dir "/usr/local/share/omf" --stringparam db2omf.help_dir "/usr/local/share/gnome/help" --stringparam db2omf.omf_in "/usr/ports/graphics/evince/work/evince-2.32.0/help/evince.omf.in"  --stringparam db2omf.scrollkeeper_cl "`scrollkeeper-config --pkgdatadir`/Templates/C/scrollkeeper_cl.xml" `/usr/local/bin/pkg-config --variable db2omf gnome-doc-utils` es/evince.xml || { rm -f "evince-es.omf"; exit 1; }
http://www.oasis-open.org/docbook/xml/4.1.2/ent/iso-pub.ent:1: parser error : Content error in the external subset
HTTP/1.1 200 OK
^
http://www.oasis-open.org/docbook/xml/4.1.2/ent/iso-pub.ent:1: validity error : All markup of the conditional section is not in the same entity
HTTP/1.1 200 OK
^
http://www.oasis-open.org/docbook/xml/4.1.2/ent/iso-pub.ent:1: parser error : Content error in the external subset
HTTP/1.1 200 OK
   ^
http://www.oasis-open.org/docbook/xml/4.1.2/ent/iso-pub.ent:1: validity error : All markup of the conditional section is not in the same entity
HTTP/1.1 200 OK
   ^
http://www.oasis-open.org/docbook/xml/4.1.2/ent/iso-pub.ent:1: parser error : Content error in the external subset
HTTP/1.1 200 OK

How-To-Repeat: make clean && make / portupgrade, both after pulling updates through csup.
